modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help trimming and merging MP4 video files on Windows.

full_description_text:  
Hola! I’m trying to figure out how to trim a zoom recording I saved on my computer, but I’m also looking to merge it with another MP4 video file. I thought it would be easy, but I’m not sure what software to use or how to do it. Any tips would be super helpful!
short_description: Need help trimming and merging MP4 video files on Windows.
description: Hola! I’m trying to figure out how to trim a zoom recording I saved on my computer, but I’m also looking to merge it with another MP4 video file. I thought it would be easy, but I’m not sure what software to use or how to do it. Any tips would be super helpful!
